parameters.content:
## HQ Agent Router (auto briefing)

1. Validate dispatch secret
2. Ack HQ immediately
3. **cursor/auto**: OpenAI → POST HQ callback (full automation)
4. **codex/claude**: remain Manual (pending / Complete UI)

Production → `HQ_AGENT_WEBHOOK_URL`

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, jobId: $json.jobId, provider: $json.provider, status: 'auto_generating', hint: 'n8n OpenAI → HQ callback' } }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $json.llmModel || 'qwen-flash-character', temperature: 0.3, max_tokens: 1200, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: $json.llmSystem }, { role: 'user', content: $json.llmUser }] }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ jobId: $json.jobId, provider: $json.provider || 'n8n', status: 'completed', text: $json.briefingText, summary: $json.briefingSummary || 'n8n auto briefing' }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ jobId: $json.jobId, provider: $json.provider || 'n8n', status: 'failed', summary: $json.briefingError || 'n8n auto briefing failed' }) }}

parameters.content:
## Codex / Claude
Ack only — complete via HQ Complete UI or callback webhook.

assignments.name: hint
assignments.value: Complete in HQ LLM & Agents, or POST /webhook/hq-agent-callback

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, jobId: $json.jobId, provider: $json.provider, status: $json.status, hint: $json.hint } }}
